replacements.changeText: 确定吗？这将用你的 VS Code 设置和扩展替换当前内容，且无法撤销。

改进 Cursor，惠及所有用户

replacements.originalText: No training. Code may be stored for Background Agent and other features.
replacements.changeText: 不用于训练。代码可能为 Background Agent 等功能而存储。

replacements.originalText: Your code data will not be trained on or used to improve the product. Code may be stored to provide features such as Background Agent.
replacements.changeText: 你的代码数据不会用于训练或改进产品。代码可能为 Background Agent 等功能而存储。
